stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct concerning the geostrophic wind?

options.a: It is present at latitudes higher than about 15 degrees north/south.
options.b: It is only present in the friction layer.
options.c: A horizontal temperature difference of at least 5 degrees Celsius per 100 km is required to have geostrophic wind conditions.
options.d: It is present in a pressure system consisting of curved and non-parallel isobars.
